svb-stress-2023-03.notes: SVB / Signature collapse, regional banking stress. First v1 window.

baseline-2025-09.notes: September 2025 baseline window. 30 NYSE sessions (2025-09-02 Tue, first session after Labor Day, through 2025-10-13 Mon). Within Finnhub's ~1-year news retention.

iran-conflict-2026-02.notes: Onset of US-Iran conflict — geopolitical-instability stress window. 30 NYSE sessions (2026-02-10 Tue through 2026-03-24 Tue; Presidents Day 2026-02-16 closure accounted for). Within Finnhub's ~1-year news retention.
